calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-07-2007 Off Calendar

Notice And Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Interrogatories, And For Costs And Expenses, Including Atty'S Fees
Off Calendar Jul-09-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff ASSET ACCEPTANCE'S Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $390, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice And Motin For Order Compelling Responses To Demand For Production Of Documents And For Costs And Attys' Fees
Off Calendar Jul-09-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC. Motion for Order Compelling Demand For Production Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $302.50, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming Admissions Admitted To Request For Admissions And Costs And Atty'S Fees
Off Calendar Jul-09-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC. Motion For Order Deeming Admissions Admitted To Request For Admissions is granted. No opposition has been filed. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $302.50, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
